texto: In Russia, war will never be popular with the profound masses of people. Revolutionary ideas are more in their taste than a victory over Germany. But one does not escape one's destiny... - Russian Minister of the Interior, Nikolai Maklakov, on 29 July 1914.
explicacao: Citação de Nikolai Maklakov sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “In Russia, war will never be popular with the profound masses of people. Revolutionary ideas are …” articula reflexao, irony, russia em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
